titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Alumni Fund Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday October 4, 2019 at 07:00
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.abstract: The records consist of the 13th annual report of the Board of Directors, meeting minutes, executive committee documents, ledgers, correspondence, donation card files, pledges, and bequests documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Alumni Fund.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 7-B (YRG 7-B), Records of offices with specific development responsibilities at Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Alumni Fund Records (RU 538). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of the 13th annual report of the Board of Directors, meeting minutes, executive committee documents, ledgers, correspondence, donation card files, pledges, and bequests documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Alumni Fund..

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Correspondence and Ledgers record the contributions to the Alumni Fund
Ledgers: Daily Entries of Contributions by Class
Semi-Centennial Celebration and Campaign: correspondence, programs and memoranda

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Donor records for the U2 Fund

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Board of Directors - Thirteenth Annual Report
Report of the meeting of the Yale Alumni Association of New York City at which the Alumni Fund was established
Forms of the Yale Alumni Fund
Annual reports of the Yale Alumni Fund
Thank-you notes sent to donors by the Yale Alumni Fund
Mailings sent by the Yale Alumni Fund
Lists of directors and agents of the Yale Alumni Fund
Charts of class gifts to principal
Letters of directors to the chairman of the Yale Alumni Fund Association, read at a meeting
General informational booklets on the Yale Alumni Fund
Programs, tickets, and invitations to Yale Alumni Fund events
"The University Alumni Fund, and Yale's Finances" by Richard A. Douglas
Donation pamphlets sent to alumni during World War I and World War II
"Yale's Reconstruction Plan: A Brief Synopsis of the Chief Features Adopted by the Corporation in March"
Report of a meeting of the Yale Alumni Fund Association held at the Yale Club
Articles in Yale Alumni Weekly on the Yale Alumni Fund
Letters to alumni containing notes from Yale presidents
"Income and Outgo of Yale Dollars Shown by Charts: Interesting Explanation Made by Alumni Fund" in The New Haven Journal
Brochures and pamphlets distributed by the Yale Alumni Fund
Mailings sent by the Yale Alumni Fund
Constitution and by-laws of the Yale Alumni Fund Association
Semi-centennial celebration of the Yale Alumni Fund
Handbooks from the Yale Alumni Fund campaign
Donation form for the Yale Architecture and Design Alumni Fund
Pamphlets on the 75th year of the Yale Alumni Fund
Report of proceedings of the Alumni Fund convocation
Annual reports of the Yale Alumni Fund
Pamphlets on bequests and memorial gifts to the Yale Alumni Fund
Brochures and pamphlets distributed by the Yale Alumni Fund
Forms of the Yale Alumni Fund
Blank memorandum forms, Yale Alumni Fund
Yale School of Music Alumni Fund stationery
